description: DevOps profile — AWS, Docker, GitHub, Terraform, Sentry for deployment and infrastructure

github.description: Manage repositories, create CI/CD workflows, manage secrets and environments

docker.description: Build, run, and manage Docker containers and images

aws.description: Provision and manage AWS resources — ECS, S3, CloudFront, RDS, Lambda

terraform.description: Plan and apply Terraform infrastructure configurations

sentry.description: Configure Sentry error tracking, upload source maps, view issues

filesystem.description: Write Dockerfiles, CI/CD workflows, and Terraform configs to disk
